summary: Closeout packet for studio-workbench-foundation (verdict: checkpoint_complete). 1 memory candidates.

extracted.text: Workbench shell is the chassis; new domains mount as left-rail entries
extracted.rationale: The frozen seven-domain Workbench shell is the canonical UI rulebook. Any new product domain (Ops, Build, Plan, etc.) mounts inside it as a left-rail entry rather than launching its own shell.

open_gaps: Default-shell cutover (replace old Studio shell with Workbench)
Media Studio control unification between prompt-first surface and production mini-app
